title: FedRAMP Execution Working Group
content:
FedRAMP Execution Working Group

#wg_fedramp (only accessible from within the company)

Working Group Agenda (only accessible from within the company)

Main Project Epic (only accessible from within the company)

GitLab’s FedRAMP Authorization Program

Internal Handbook Page

GitLab achieves FedRAMP Moderate Authorization (Authority to Operate - ATO) for a new SaaS offering.

Roles and Responsibilities

Dir, Product Management

SaaS Platforms Product Leadership

PubSec PM / Product DRI

SaaS Platforms Infrastructure Leadership

Sr. Sec. Program Manager

Security Program Manager

Dir. Threat Management

Vulnerability Remediation DRI

EM US Public Sector Services

Sr. Dir. Security Assurance

GitLab is pursuing FedRAMP authorization at the Moderate Impact Level .
We will evaluate demand for High once we attain Moderate.

Further details of the FedRAMP plan, including anticipated or actual dates, cannot be shared publicly at this time.
Team members can view details in the internal handbook . This public handbook page contains information about the FedRAMP Authorization process as it pertains to GitLab.
